payload.$comment: Shared primitives inlined from upstream definitions.json; not resolved at runtime (ADR 0064).
payload.title: Quote

slippageBips.title: Slippage Bips
slippageBips.description: Slippage tolerance that was applied to the order to get the limit price. Expressed in Basis Points (BPS). One basis point is equivalent to 0.01% (1/100th of a percent)

smartSlippage.title: Smart Slippage
smartSlippage.description: Whether the given slippageBips used is originated from a Smart slippage suggestion
